paneContent:
в—Џ Got it вЂ” two-way messaging is live with jade-ibis. Let me refresh my config to see
  the peer details.

в—Џ Check messaging config (shell)
  в”‚ cat .storyboard/terminals/agent-lkdi84.json | jq '{messaging, connectedWidgets}'
  в”‚ 2>/dev/null
  в”” 33 lines...

в—Џ Two-way messaging with jade-ibis (agent-m4biyi) is confirmed. I'm ready вЂ” when a
  message comes in from them, I'll respond immediately.

вќЇ Tell your parner a joke

в—Џ Send joke to jade-ibis (shell)
  в”‚ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus && npx
  в”‚ storyboard terminal output --summary "Told jade-ibis a joke" --content "Why do
  в”‚ programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs." && npx storyboard
  в”‚ terminal send agent-m4biyi "Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light
  в”‚ attracts bugs."
  в”” 4 lines...

в—Џ  Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs.

  Sent to jade-ibis рџђ¦ вЂ” though it looks like they're not running yet, so the message
  is queued for when they start up.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus [вЋ‡ 0.5.0--messaging-bus*%]
